name: sebelumtutup
description: Website demo arena opini singkat dan curhat anonim semi-live.

scripts.install: node -e "console.log('Dependencies ready. Gunakan npm install untuk memasang paket.')"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n db,server,client -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run db:local:start" "NODE_ENV=development PORT=4000 DATABASE_URL=postgresql://sebel:sebel_password@127.0.0.1:55432/sebelumtutup?schema=public CLIENT_ORIGIN=http://localhost:5173 SITE_NAME=SebelumTutup SITE_CLOSE_AT=2026-05-22T23:59:59+07:00 ADMIN_USERNAME=admin ADMIN_PASSWORD=change-me-admin SESSION_SECRET=local-session-secret-32-characters COOKIE_SECRET=local-cookie-secret-32-characters RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS=60000 RATE_LIMIT_MAX_POSTS=20 RATE_LIMIT_MAX_COMMENTS=40 RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REPORTS=20 npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
